title: DataCraft
description: A primarily survival/technology-centric modpack with configured adjustments to enable a symbiotic tech progression.
body:
# DataCraft

Welcome to the Tech/Survival Modpack for the DataCraft server. This pack introduces recipe and mechanic changes, guiding players through a progression from lower tech mods like Create to mods such as immersive engineering and eventually mekanism. But, survival is a crucial element here. Before diving too deep into advanced technology, players must contend with new survival mechanics—thirst, diet, and temperature—posing challenges until automation mastery is achieved. Amidst the struggle for survival, you can also immerse yourself in creative hobbies such as photography, painting, and music conduction when the tech challenges take a breather.

## Attribution

- Lucky's Spelunker's Charm II ([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii))
- Laudividni's Discs ([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/laudividnis-discs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/laudividnis-discs))
- Stay True ResourcePack ([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true))
